case_title: RUSSELL A ROBINSON VS. EQUIAN LLC SUCCESSOR TO TROVER SOLUTIONS INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-18-2017 CONTINUED TO NOV-29-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
